sentences.translation: Enes je tražio od prijatelja knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: Anas asked his friend for a book.

sentences.translation: Prijatelj mu je dao knjigu s velikim zadovoljstvom.
sentences.translationEn: His friend gave him the book with great pleasure.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدَ أَنَسٌ بِأَنْ يُعِيدَهُ بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Enes je obećao da će ga vratiti za sedmicu.
sentences.translationEn: Anas promised to return it after a week.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ الكِتَابَ وَأَعَادَهُ فِي الوَقْتِ المُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Pročitao je knjigu i vratio je u dogovoreno vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: He read the book and returned it on time.
